history.qwen_observation: Spring Boot 3 upgrade failed because @ConstructorBinding and WebSecurityConfigurerAdapter were removed in Spring Boot 3 / Spring Security 6, causing compilation errors.
history.qwen_rationale: Folding RemoveConstructorBindingAnnotation and RemoveAnnotation into the SB3 step removes the deprecated annotation before compilation. Inserting the custom RewriteWebSecurityConfigurerAdapterToFilterChain recipe after the SB3 step converts the deprecated security adapter to a SecurityFilterChain bean, resolving the missing symbol errors and allowing the build to proceed to Java 21.

history.qwen_observation: Build failed during Spring Boot 3.3 upgrade because WebSecurityConfigurerAdapter was removed in Spring Security 6, causing compilation to fail before subsequent migration steps could run.
history.qwen_rationale: Moving the WebSecurityConfigurerAdapter-to-FilterChain rewrite step before the Spring Boot 3.3 upgrade ensures the deprecated adapter is replaced with a SecurityFilterChain bean while the project still compiles on Spring Boot 2.x. This prevents the immediate compilation failure that blocked the previous chain, allowing the SB3 upgrade and subsequent JDK 21 migrations to proceed.
